text: Set up API credentials for content publishing
description:
**HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED**

Navigate to `/home/felix/dev/aimparency/v7/subdev/experience-mining/` and create a `.secrets` file with:

```
TWITTER_API_KEY=your_twitter_api_key
TWITTER_API_SECRET=your_twitter_api_secret
TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN=your_twitter_access_token
TWITTER_ACCESS_SECRET=your_twitter_access_secret
INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID=your_instagram_business_id
INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN=your_instagram_access_token
```

**How to obtain:**
- Twitter: https://developer.twitter.com/en/portal/dashboard → Create app → Keys and tokens
- Instagram: https://developers.facebook.com/docs/instagram-api/getting-started → Get access token for your business account

**After setup:** Mark aims ecb39043 and d31b36da as ready to proceed.

status.comment: Waiting for human to configure API credentials
